summary: Normalized historical qd run report_path values out of worktree and absolute worktree locations into canonical reports/qd/<node-id>/<report>.json paths, and tightened qd report validation so non-empty run report paths must be repo-relative, traversal-free, and present in the checkout.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Historical qd run report_path values pointing into .qd/worktrees, /home worktrees, or /Users worktrees are normalized to canonical reports/qd/<node-id>/<report>.json paths when that report exists.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Normalized 127 existing worktree-backed run report paths in roadmap/qd-export.json to canonical reports/qd/<node-id>/completion.json or reports/qd/<node-id>/audit.json based on run kind. A post-normalization scan found 0 remaining non-empty run report paths containing .qd/worktrees, starting with /home/, or starting with /Users/.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh rejects non-empty roadmap/qd-export.json run report_path values that are absolute, contain traversal, or do not exist.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh now validates non-empty string .runs[].report_path values and reports errors for absolute paths, '..' traversal via path_has_traversal, and paths missing from the checkout. evidence/m4-qd-run-report-path-contract/negative-smoke-stale-absolute-report-path.log records a stale absolute worktree path failing as expected.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing qd reports and roadmap export pass the stricter check after normalization.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-run-report-path-contract/just-qd-reports-check.log records nix develop -c just qd-reports-check passing after normalization.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, just check, and a temporary-copy negative smoke test for a stale absolute or worktree run report path.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-run-report-path-contract/negative-smoke-stale-absolute-report-path.log records the temporary mutation failure; evidence/m4-qd-run-report-path-contract/just-qd-reports-check.log and evidence/m4-qd-run-report-path-contract/just-check.log record the requested Linux validations.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: realWorldValidation.required is false because the change is repository metadata and Linux shell validation only.

commandsRun.command: temporary stale absolute worktree run report_path negative smoke test

realWorldValidation.evidence: Linux repository validation passed; no macOS-specific validation is required or claimed.
